CustomField.formula:
IF( AND( TEXT(BillingScheduleGroup.BillingTermUnit) = 'One-Time', TEXT(BillingScheduleGroup.BillingMethod) = 'Order Amount' ), 'One time',
IF( AND( TEXT(BillingScheduleGroup.BillingTermUnit) = 'Billing Milestone Plan', TEXT(BillingScheduleGroup.BillingMethod) = 'Order Amount' ), 'Milestone Plan',
IF( AND( TEXT(BillingScheduleGroup.BillingTermUnit) = 'Month', OR( TEXT(BillingScheduleGroup.BillingMethod) = 'Order Amount', TEXT(BillingScheduleGroup.BillingMethod) = 'Evergreen' ) ), 'Monthly Subscription',
IF( AND( TEXT(BillingScheduleGroup.BillingTermUnit) = 'Quarter', OR( TEXT(BillingScheduleGroup.BillingMethod) = 'Order Amount', TEXT(BillingScheduleGroup.BillingMethod) = 'Evergreen' ) ), 'Quarterly Subscription',
IF( AND( TEXT(BillingScheduleGroup.BillingTermUnit) = 'Semi-Annual', OR( TEXT(BillingScheduleGroup.BillingMethod) = 'Order Amount', TEXT(BillingScheduleGroup.BillingMethod) = 'Evergreen' ) ), 'Semi-Annual Subscription',
IF( AND( TEXT(BillingScheduleGroup.BillingTermUnit) = 'Year', OR( TEXT(BillingScheduleGroup.BillingMethod) = 'Order Amount', TEXT(BillingScheduleGroup.BillingMethod) = 'Evergreen' ) ), 'Annual Subscription',
IF( AND( TEXT(BillingScheduleGroup.BillingTermUnit) = 'Day', OR( TEXT(BillingScheduleGroup.BillingMethod) = 'Order Amount', TEXT(BillingScheduleGroup.BillingMethod) = 'Evergreen' ) ), 'Daily Subscription',
IF( TEXT(BillingScheduleGroup.BillingMethod) = 'Usage', 'Usage Resource',
'Other' ) ) ) ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Charge Type
